title: FYI ГўВЂВ” June 2023

FYI ГўВЂВ” June 2023
FYI ГўВ”ВЂ June 2023
The following updates were made to the Payment Solutions Manual.
Bill Payments Volume
Online Tracing Part
Section 12.1, Settlement of Adjustments and Service Charges
We clarified that the ГўВЂВњClosed ГўВЂВ“ SettledГўВЂВќ report on OLT is used to reconcile the transactions to the postings on Central 1 Banking System (CBS) Online.
Currency Volume
FX Notes Plus Part
Section 1.4, Contacts, Websites, and Other Resources
We clarified that the Exchange Bank of Canada (EBC) contact for settlement inquiries is the same as for draft and cheque clearing inquiries:
payments@ebcfx.com
or
1-877-786-3084
.

e-Transfer

Limit Groups
9369
We added ГўВЂВњLimit Group 18ГўВЂВќ. This group is similar to Group 2 with the addition of no delay transfers for lower dollar amounts ($250 for the maximum amount per no delay transfer).
